'''Oobel''' was a [[Gupin/Legends|Gupin]] from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. He was the brother of [[Mring-Mring]] and the cousin of [[Punt]].

When Punt rose to the throne, the key to the [[Juniper Chest]] was stolen by the [[Grass Trekker/Legends|Grass Trekkers]], thus preventing the Gupins from refreshing their powers. In desperation, Oobel sought out the outcast Mring-Mring, convinced that he was a prophesied future king of their people.

With the help of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and his friends' help, the key was recovered. However when circumstances forced Mring-Mring to attempt to open the chest without the key and succeeding, he was proclaimed king and he immediately appointed Oobel as second in command.
